title: Exploration MC
description: A modpack that makes Minecraft the perfect immersive exploration game!
body:
![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d094081d2b385b1c02667064c11246f2415f32c1.png)
**Ready for a new adventure?**!

Hop right in and immerse yourself in this modpack that is designed to create the perfect immersive experience just for exploration. This modpack includes **Exposure mod** so you can capture the beauty of the world around you!

### Main Focus:
This modpack is designed to give you an immersive and fully optimized experience while exploring the Minecraft world

### Please note:
This is my first ever public modpack so you can give me suggestions on what to add and improve (or remove) in the future by sending me a message on Discord: creeptonitus


<details>
<summary>Major content</summary>

- Better vanilla structures
- Distant Horizons
- More structures
- More biomes

</details>
